plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-489 RP16.P02.M09.S09-RP16.P03.M06.S12 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-489 implements descriptor-only coverage of the RP16 p02 closeout p03 foundation: the M09 Claude Review Packet tail (the fourteen remaining rows), the full M10 Closeout And Next Handoff cycle (twenty rows), the full P03 Scope Inventory, Contract Draft, Type And Shape Definition, Primary Implementation Slice, Secondary Workflow Slice, and Permission And Audit Binding cycles, and the P03 Synthetic Fixture Set head (the first twelve rows) as nine descriptor-only sections over 150 planned rows with Hermes evidence (H16), Claude review packet (C16), and CP00-490 handoff, without opening governance, DLP, legal hold, or retention runtime or any other closed runtime surface.

parsed_review.summary: CP00-489 is a descriptor-only governance-core closeout pack (RP16, risk C, 150 units, range RP16.P02.M09.S09-RP16.P03.M06.S12) and the pack-level claim is correctly conservative: production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, implementation_layer=descriptor, no_real_data=true, writes_product_state=false. Scope is triple-consistent across the prompt baseline, registry requirements (GOVERNANCE_CORE_CP489_REQUIREMENTS/PACK_BINDING), the contract current_pack/p02_closeout_p03_foundation_descriptor, and the manifest: same risk class, unit_count, range, upstream (CP00-488), next (CP00-490), next_subphase (RP16.P03.M06.S13), and identical deliverable distribution {ui6,implementation63,claude_review6,failure_recovery4,test20,contract31,security_audit16,hermes_evidence4} and micro-title counts (both sum to 150). Implementation in service.js/validators.js/registry.js builds the descriptor, case set, coverage+descriptor validators, Hermes evidence packet, Claude review packet, and closeout handoff, all wrapped by freezeCp489Result/freezeCp489Validation enforcing descriptor_only, no state writes, no runtime dispatch, no real fixture data, customer-safe errors, and the CP489 no-write attestation. index.js re-exports via wildcard so the new CP489 symbols are exported without an index.js diff. Tests (model.test.js: 3 CP489 cases) and the RP16 validator (deep-equality of contract vs generated descriptor, coverage by micro-phase, descriptor-only rows, authority boundary) cover the slice; command-evidence records 27 commands at exit 0 including node --check/--test, rp16:governance-core:validate, closeout-pack-plan:validate, npm test, npm run validate, and git diff --check. Review-hardening evidence is valid: readiness auth-preflight passed (exit 0, 1431-byte well-formed JSON stdout, not 0-byte/malformed/fenced/tool-call-shaped), only Read/Grep/Glob tools, prompt 2445B within limit, summary-only review correctly prohibited for a Risk C pack with security/review deliverables. Authority boundary holds throughout: claude_is_final_approval=false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false, human final approval required; Hermes appears only as descriptor-only evidence (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false, hermes_runtime_embedded_in_product=false, program descriptor_only=true). Safety greps across the changed governance source found no child_process/network/file-write/DB calls and no secrets or real data — only '*: false' attestation flags. Unrelated dirty/untracked files (progress-control-room, workbook docs, LDIP invalid-attempt fixture) are correctly scoped out via changed-file-scope and not attributed to this pack. No P0/P1/P2/P3 issues found. This review is independent read-only advisory evidence, not final approval; pack closeout still depends on the post-review gated commands (closeout-pack:review/normalize/receipt:validate, closeout-pack-plan:generate, closeout-pack:validate, git diff --check --cached) and human final approval.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-489 governance core p02 closeout p03 foundation descriptor pack
